race.comment: ARCTURUS STAR (3) is knocking on the door and looks ready to peak. Draws ideally and doesn't need to improve much to break through. WORD GAME (13) resumes for the Rutten camp after catching the eye on debut in February, storming home from the tail to finish fourth in a strong maiden. She's fitter for a solid trial but faces a tricky draw and will also be doing her best work late. LOSEYATOETOE (11) continues to race well, though the awkward draw means Holder will need to produce a smart ride. DONVILLA D'OR (8) has yet to find the top-three in three career runs but was not far away last time when a 2.5 len eighth over 1300m at Swan Hill. Improver with claims.
